# NexusWeb3

**AI Agent Economy Infrastructure on Base.**

30 composable on-chain protocols for autonomous AI agents — wallets, identity, payments, yield, insurance, reputation, and safety controls.

### What We Build

- On-chain protocols for the machine economy
- x402 Security API (pay-per-call, USDC on Base)
- Agent-native infrastructure — built for machines, not humans
